for n in seg['nodes']:

        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check purple L-shape specifically
print("\nPurple objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
